chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.3091 of 2025 [Bilqees v. The State] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection at A 2.For hg of bail appln 04.12.2025. Mr. Waqar Ahmed Khoso, advocate for applicant. Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, Deputy Prosecutor General. ----------- MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- After arguing the case at some length, learned defence counsel does not press this bail application and seeks directions to the trial court to expedite the trial, which has not been opposed by learned D.P.G. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial court is, however, directed to expedite the trial, examine material witnesses and conclude it within three months without fail, after which in any case, the applicant would be at liberty to repeat his bail application, which will be decided on its own merits. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
